concept: The Calm Cognitive Journal - Blending Audio Waveform UI, Print Editorial Typography, and Physical Journal Textures.

rules: Headings must use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight or tracking-tighter).
Labels/Overlines must be uppercase, tiny, and widely spaced.
Never use Inter, Roboto, or standard sans-serif for headings. Use Newsreader for an introspective, editorial voice.
Never use pure black or pure gray. Black must be tinted warm (#1A1918).
No standard Vercel-look blue/purple gradients. Use solid earth tones or extremely soft radial blurs for the wave.
Never use teal or purple for call-to-action buttons.

visual_enhancers.textures: Apply a subtle CSS/SVG grain noise overlay (opacity-20, mix-blend-multiply) over the main background to break the digital flatness and evoke paper.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: For floating navigation and sticky headers, use 'Optical Clarity': bg-white/70, backdrop-blur-2xl, and a delicate 1px border-white/40.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Use soft ambient shadows rather than harsh drop shadows: shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(26,25,24,0.04)].
visual_enhancers.borders: Use 1px solid strokes (border-[#E8E4DB]) instead of heavy shadows for memory cards.

layouts.spacing: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Default padding for containers is p-6 or p-8. Sections separated by gap-12 or gap-16.
layouts.structure: Mobile-first PWA App Shell. Use max-w-md mx-auto h-[100dvh] relative overflow-hidden flex flex-col to simulate a mobile app on desktop.
layouts.grids: Use high density grid (bento-style) for memory tags, but keep card layouts soft. Avoid perfect symmetry.
layouts.alignment: Paragraphs and dense text MUST be left-aligned. Center alignment is only permitted for the main interactive wave.

motion.transitions: Use Framer Motion springs for layout shifts (stiffness: 300, damping: 30). Use CSS transitions specifically on transform and opacity, NEVER transition: all.
motion.micro_interactions: Interactive elements should scale down slightly on press (scale: 0.97) and gently darken on hover.
motion.wave_animation: The central Voice Wave must breathe (slow pulse) when idle. During recording, it should become an organic, asymmetrical shifting blob/wave, avoiding rigid mathematical symmetry.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text contrast meets 4.5:1 ratio over backgrounds. Use the tinted charcoal (#1A1918) for all primary text.
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion for the wave animation.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute using kebab-case role-based naming (e.g., data-testid='record-button').

images.description: Rippling water texture for an onboarding screen background or ambient overlay.
Soft abstract white snowdrift texture for empty memory states.

media.3d_libraries: Framer Motion for 2D/2.5D wave animations. Avoid heavy 3D (R3F) as the app requires low resource usage for local ML models (Whisper/Transformers.js).

VoiceWave.description: A dynamic Framer Motion SVG wave that acts as the core UI element. Shifts color and shape based on state (idle, calm, energetic).

MemoryCard.description: A refined card displaying transcribed text and tags. Uses sharp inner contrasts and a 1px border instead of muddy shadows.

BottomNav.description: Optical crystal glass floating nav bar with Lucide icons. Uses backdrop-blur-2xl and bg-white/70.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Do not use App.css to center align the app container. Keep text structurally left-aligned.
2. All frontend code must use standard JS (.js, .jsx). DO NOT USE TypeScript (.tsx) files.
3. Implement the UI for a mobile-first PWA experience (max-w-md mx-auto).
4. Use Framer Motion for the wave UI. Make it organic, non-symmetrical, and highly responsive to simulated audio states.
5. Use Lucide icons. Ensure icon stroke width is elegant (1.5 or 2).
6. Build Shadcn components using standard HTML/Tailwind tailored to this earthy aesthetic.
7. Set up the Web Worker logic for Transformers.js transcription but keep the UI unblocked.
8. Apply 'data-testid' to ALL buttons, links, and form inputs for robust testing.
9. Use IndexedDB for local memory storage logic as specified in the problem statement.
10. DO NOT use completely transparent backgrounds for elements where content scrolls under (e.g. Nav/Header); use backdrop-blur glassmorphism.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not converge toward generic outputs. Use layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Dark colors look good independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Never apply universal transitions (transition: all). Use specific transitions.
Never use AI assistant emojis (🤖, 🧠, etc.) for icons.
Include data-testid attributes on all interactive elements.
Use named exports for components and default exports for pages.
